datasets.name: player_match_ratings
datasets.description: Position-adjusted post-match ratings and their underlying player-match features for each EPL season.
datasets.grain: one player appearance per match and rating model version
quality_rules: Ratings are unique by player, match, and rating model version.
Minutes cannot be negative.
Post-match ratings remain on the documented 1–10 scale.
All season partitions use a compatible schema.

fields.name: match_id
fields.description: Stable WhoScored match identifier.

fields.name: player_id
fields.description: Canonical player identifier used by the serving layer.

fields.name: team_id
fields.description: WhoScored team identifier for the player in the match or serving snapshot.

fields.name: side
fields.description: Whether the player represented the home or away team.

fields.name: player_name
fields.description: Player display name carried from the source record.

fields.name: position
fields.description: Detailed WhoScored position code recorded for the appearance.

fields.name: shirt_number
fields.description: Squad number recorded for the appearance.

fields.name: started
fields.description: Whether the player was in the starting lineup.

fields.name: is_man_of_match
fields.description: Whether WhoScored marked the player as man of the match.

fields.name: player_json
fields.description: Serialized source player payload retained for traceability.

fields.name: minutes
fields.description: Minutes played in the row's match, season, or valuation interval.

fields.name: minutes_source
fields.description: Source or calculation method used for minutes played.

fields.name: position_group
fields.description: Broad position group used by the current rating or valuation model.

fields.name: position_group_source
fields.description: Method used to derive the broad position group.

fields.name: whoscored_player_id
fields.description: Player identifier from WhoScored.

fields.name: season
fields.description: Competition season label in YYYY-YYYY format.

fields.name: match_datetime
fields.description: Scheduled or observed match kickoff timestamp.

fields.name: shots
fields.description: Total shot attempts credited to the player.

fields.name: goals
fields.description: Goals scored by the player.

fields.name: xg
fields.description: Expected goals generated by the player's shots.

fields.name: xgot
fields.description: Expected goals on target generated by on-target shots.

fields.name: passes
fields.description: Pass attempts credited to the player.

fields.name: completed_passes
fields.description: Successful pass attempts.

fields.name: key_passes
fields.description: Passes directly creating a shot.

fields.name: progressive_passes
fields.description: Passes meeting the project progression threshold.

fields.name: assists
fields.description: Goals directly assisted by the player.

fields.name: xa
fields.description: Expected assists generated by the player's passes.

fields.name: carries
fields.description: Ball carries credited to the player.

fields.name: progressive_carries
fields.description: Carries meeting the project progression threshold.

fields.name: final_third_carries
fields.description: Carries ending in the attacking final third.

fields.name: carries_into_box
fields.description: Carries entering the penalty area.

fields.name: xt_added
fields.description: Expected-threat value added by player actions.

fields.name: xpv_added
fields.description: Expected possession-value contribution added by player actions.

fields.name: opponent_threat_prevented
fields.description: Estimated opponent threat removed by defensive actions.

fields.name: defensive_net_threat_reduction
fields.description: Net opponent threat reduction after accounting for defensive actions and concessions.

fields.name: yellow_cards
fields.description: Yellow cards received.

fields.name: red_cards
fields.description: Red cards received.

fields.name: big_chances_missed
fields.description: Big chances that did not result in a goal.

fields.name: big_chance_xg_missed
fields.description: Expected-goal value of missed big chances.

fields.name: own_goals
fields.description: Own goals scored by the player.

fields.name: shots_on_target_faced
fields.description: On-target shots faced by a goalkeeper.

fields.name: goals_conceded_xgot_sample
fields.description: Goals conceded for the subset of shots with xGOT coverage.

fields.name: xgot_faced
fields.description: Expected goals on target faced by a goalkeeper.

fields.name: goals_conceded
fields.description: Goals conceded while the goalkeeper was involved.

fields.name: big_chances_created
fields.description: High-quality chances created for teammates.

fields.name: shots_90
fields.description: Total shot attempts credited to the player normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: log_shots_90
fields.description: Natural-log transformed shots 90 used to reduce skew during model fitting.

fields.name: xg_90
fields.description: Expected goals generated by the player's shots normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: log_xg_90
fields.description: Natural-log transformed xG 90 used to reduce skew during model fitting.

fields.name: xgot_90
fields.description: Expected goals on target generated by on-target shots normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: log_xgot_90
fields.description: Natural-log transformed xGOT 90 used to reduce skew during model fitting.

fields.name: xa_90
fields.description: Expected assists generated by the player's passes normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: log_xa_90
fields.description: Natural-log transformed xA 90 used to reduce skew during model fitting.

fields.name: key_passes_90
fields.description: Passes directly creating a shot normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: log_key_passes_90
fields.description: Natural-log transformed key passes 90 used to reduce skew during model fitting.

fields.name: big_chances_created_90
fields.description: High-quality chances created for teammates normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: log_big_chances_created_90
fields.description: Natural-log transformed big chances created 90 used to reduce skew during model fitting.

fields.name: progressive_passes_90
fields.description: Passes meeting the project progression threshold normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: log_progressive_passes_90
fields.description: Natural-log transformed progressive passes 90 used to reduce skew during model fitting.

fields.name: progressive_carries_90
fields.description: Carries meeting the project progression threshold normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: log_progressive_carries_90
fields.description: Natural-log transformed progressive carries 90 used to reduce skew during model fitting.

fields.name: final_third_carries_90
fields.description: Carries ending in the attacking final third normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: log_final_third_carries_90
fields.description: Natural-log transformed final third carries 90 used to reduce skew during model fitting.

fields.name: xpv_added_90
fields.description: Expected possession-value contribution added by player actions normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: opponent_threat_prevented_90
fields.description: Estimated opponent threat removed by defensive actions normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: defensive_net_threat_reduction_90
fields.description: Net opponent threat reduction after accounting for defensive actions and concessions normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: pass_completion_prior
fields.description: Role-level prior mean used to stabilize pass completion.

fields.name: pass_prior_strength
fields.description: Equivalent attempt count assigned to the pass-completion prior.

fields.name: smoothed_pass_completion
fields.description: Pass completion after empirical-Bayes shrinkage.

fields.name: pass_completion_above_expected
fields.description: Difference between smoothed and expected pass completion.

fields.name: finishing_above_expected
fields.description: Goals scored above expected goals.

fields.name: shot_placement_above_expected
fields.description: Expected-goals-on-target output above expected goals.

fields.name: saves
fields.description: On-target shots faced minus goals conceded.

fields.name: save_percentage
fields.description: Share of on-target shots saved.

fields.name: goals_prevented
fields.description: Expected goals on target faced minus goals conceded.

fields.name: threat_component
fields.description: Standardized shot-threat contribution used by the post-match rating.

fields.name: creation_component
fields.description: Standardized chance-creation contribution used by the post-match rating.

fields.name: progression_component
fields.description: Standardized ball-progression contribution used by the post-match rating.

fields.name: retention_component
fields.description: Standardized possession-retention contribution used by the post-match rating.

fields.name: attacking_xpv_component
fields.description: Standardized attacking xPV contribution used by the post-match rating.

fields.name: defensive_component
fields.description: Standardized defensive contribution used by the post-match rating.

fields.name: finishing_component
fields.description: Standardized finishing contribution used by the post-match rating.

fields.name: raw_position_composite
fields.description: Weighted component composite before reliability adjustment.

fields.name: appearance_reliability
fields.description: Minutes-based reliability weight applied to the appearance.

fields.name: reliability_adjusted_composite
fields.description: Position composite after shrinkage toward the role baseline.

fields.name: standardized_composite
fields.description: Role-standardized composite used to map performance onto the rating scale.

fields.name: goalkeeper_component
fields.description: Standardized shot-stopping contribution used for goalkeepers.

fields.name: clean_sheet_bonus
fields.description: Bounded goalkeeper bonus for a clean sheet.

fields.name: base_rating
fields.description: Rating before decisive-action bonuses and disciplinary penalties.

fields.name: assist_overperformance
fields.description: Assists above expected assists used by the decisive-action adjustment.

fields.name: decisive_action_bonus
fields.description: Bounded bonus for goals, assists, and other decisive actions.

fields.name: card_penalty
fields.description: Rating deduction for yellow and red cards.

fields.name: big_chance_miss_penalty
fields.description: Rating deduction for missed big chances.

fields.name: own_goal_penalty
fields.description: Rating deduction for own goals.

fields.name: post_match_rating
fields.description: Final position-adjusted player rating on a 1–10 scale.

fields.name: rating_version
fields.description: Immutable version identifier for the post-match rating formula.

fields.name: form_rating_ewm
fields.description: Minutes-weighted exponentially decayed form rating.

fields.name: rolling_3_match_rating
fields.description: Mean rating over the latest three eligible appearances.

fields.name: rolling_20_match_rating
fields.description: Mean rating over the latest 20 eligible appearances.

datasets.name: players
datasets.description: Current player-level serving snapshot combining entity resolution, recent form, latest Transfermarkt valuation, and the active model projection.
datasets.grain: one current serving row per canonical player
quality_rules: Canonical player IDs are unique and non-null.
Forecast bounds contain the point estimate.
Probability and confidence values remain between zero and one.

fields.name: player_id
fields.description: Canonical player identifier used by the serving layer.

fields.name: whoscored_player_id
fields.description: Player identifier from WhoScored.

fields.name: transfermarkt_player_id
fields.description: Player identifier from Transfermarkt.

fields.name: mapping_method
fields.description: Entity-resolution method used to connect source identifiers.

fields.name: mapping_confidence
fields.description: Confidence assigned to the accepted cross-source mapping.

fields.name: display_name
fields.description: Canonical player name shown by the API and dashboard.

fields.name: team_id
fields.description: WhoScored team identifier for the player in the match or serving snapshot.

fields.name: position
fields.description: Detailed WhoScored position code recorded for the appearance.

fields.name: current_form_rating
fields.description: Latest exponentially weighted form rating exposed by the API.

fields.name: rolling_3_match_rating
fields.description: Mean rating over the latest three eligible appearances.

fields.name: rolling_20_match_rating
fields.description: Mean rating over the latest 20 eligible appearances.

fields.name: latest_valuation_date
fields.description: Date of the most recent published Transfermarkt valuation.

fields.name: current_market_value_eur
fields.description: Most recent observed Transfermarkt market value.

fields.name: estimated_value_eur
fields.description: Current model point estimate exposed by the API.

fields.name: estimated_lower_eur
fields.description: Lower bound of the current 90% predictive interval.

fields.name: estimated_upper_eur
fields.description: Upper bound of the current 90% predictive interval.

fields.name: predicted_pct_change
fields.description: Predicted pct change.

fields.name: probability_value_increase
fields.description: Posterior probability that market value increased.

fields.name: valuation_model_version
fields.description: Version identifier for the active valuation model.

fields.name: direction
fields.description: Categorical interpretation of the predicted value movement.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Normalized forecast-confidence indicator exposed to the UI.

fields.name: refreshed_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the serving snapshot was generated.

datasets.name: valuation_history
datasets.description: Observed Transfermarkt market-value history mapped to the canonical player identifier.
datasets.grain: one observed player valuation per date and source
quality_rules: Observed valuation values cannot be negative.
A player has at most one value per date and source.

fields.name: player_id
fields.description: Canonical player identifier used by the serving layer.

fields.name: transfermarkt_player_id
fields.description: Player identifier from Transfermarkt.

fields.name: valuation_date
fields.description: Date of the observed target or current valuation.

fields.name: value_eur
fields.description: Observed market value in euros.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Source system that published the valuation observation.

datasets.name: player_valuation_predictions
datasets.description: Current valuation model outputs, predictive intervals, probabilities, and the historical interval features used to produce them.
datasets.grain: one valuation interval or current prediction row
quality_rules: The predictive lower bound does not exceed the point estimate.
The point estimate does not exceed the predictive upper bound.
Probability of increase remains between zero and one.

fields.name: interval_id
fields.description: Stable identifier for the modeled valuation interval.

fields.name: transfermarkt_player_id
fields.description: Player identifier from Transfermarkt.

fields.name: whoscored_player_id
fields.description: Player identifier from WhoScored.

fields.name: previous_valuation_date
fields.description: Date of the observed valuation that starts the interval.

fields.name: previous_market_value_eur
fields.description: Observed market value at the start of the interval.

fields.name: two_updates_back_value_eur
fields.description: Observed value two Transfermarkt updates before the interval target.

fields.name: age_at_valuation
fields.description: Player age in years at the start of the valuation interval.

fields.name: club_name
fields.description: Club associated with the valuation observation.

fields.name: valuation_date
fields.description: Date of the observed target or current valuation.

fields.name: interval_days
fields.description: Number of days between observed valuation updates.

fields.name: log_previous_market_value
fields.description: Natural logarithm of the previous observed market value.

fields.name: previous_log_value_change
fields.description: Log change in value during the preceding valuation interval.

fields.name: market_value_eur
fields.description: Observed market value at the end of a labeled interval.

fields.name: target_log_value_change
fields.description: Observed log market-value change used as the regression target.

fields.name: target_pct_value_change
fields.description: Observed proportional market-value change.

fields.name: appearances
fields.description: Distinct player appearances represented by the row.

fields.name: starts
fields.description: Number of starts in the valuation interval.

fields.name: minutes
fields.description: Minutes played in the row's match, season, or valuation interval.

fields.name: position_group
fields.description: Broad position group used by the current rating or valuation model.

fields.name: player_name
fields.description: Player display name carried from the source record.

fields.name: average_rating
fields.description: Mean post-match rating during the valuation interval.

fields.name: recency_weighted_rating
fields.description: Interval rating weighted toward more recent appearances.

fields.name: rating_last_90_days
fields.description: Mean eligible rating during the 90 days before the valuation cutoff.

fields.name: rating_volatility
fields.description: Standard deviation of post-match ratings during the interval.

fields.name: threat_component_average
fields.description: Mean standardized shot-threat contribution used by the post-match rating. across appearances in the valuation interval.

fields.name: creation_component_average
fields.description: Mean standardized chance-creation contribution used by the post-match rating. across appearances in the valuation interval.

fields.name: progression_component_average
fields.description: Mean standardized ball-progression contribution used by the post-match rating. across appearances in the valuation interval.

fields.name: retention_component_average
fields.description: Mean standardized possession-retention contribution used by the post-match rating. across appearances in the valuation interval.

fields.name: attacking_xpv_component_average
fields.description: Mean standardized attacking xPV contribution used by the post-match rating. across appearances in the valuation interval.

fields.name: defensive_component_average
fields.description: Mean standardized defensive contribution used by the post-match rating. across appearances in the valuation interval.

fields.name: finishing_component_average
fields.description: Mean standardized finishing contribution used by the post-match rating. across appearances in the valuation interval.

fields.name: goals
fields.description: Goals scored by the player.

fields.name: assists
fields.description: Goals directly assisted by the player.

fields.name: xg
fields.description: Expected goals generated by the player's shots.

fields.name: xgot
fields.description: Expected goals on target generated by on-target shots.

fields.name: xa
fields.description: Expected assists generated by the player's passes.

fields.name: big_chances_missed
fields.description: Big chances that did not result in a goal.

fields.name: big_chance_xg_missed
fields.description: Expected-goal value of missed big chances.

fields.name: own_goals
fields.description: Own goals scored by the player.

fields.name: form_rating_ewm
fields.description: Minutes-weighted exponentially decayed form rating.

fields.name: rolling_3_match_rating
fields.description: Mean rating over the latest three eligible appearances.

fields.name: rolling_20_match_rating
fields.description: Mean rating over the latest 20 eligible appearances.

fields.name: rolling_3_matches_available
fields.description: Number of eligible matches available for the three-match window.

fields.name: rolling_20_matches_available
fields.description: Number of eligible matches available for the 20-match window.

fields.name: log_minutes
fields.description: Natural logarithm of interval minutes plus one.

fields.name: log_appearances
fields.description: Natural logarithm of interval appearances plus one.

fields.name: start_share
fields.description: Share of interval appearances that were starts.

fields.name: age_squared
fields.description: Squared age term used to model nonlinear age effects.

fields.name: valuation_year
fields.description: Calendar year of the valuation cutoff.

fields.name: valuation_month_sin
fields.description: Sine encoding of valuation month seasonality.

fields.name: valuation_month_cos
fields.description: Cosine encoding of valuation month seasonality.

fields.name: recent_rating_trend
fields.description: Difference between short-window and long-window rating form.

fields.name: goals_per90
fields.description: Goals scored by the player normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: assists_per90
fields.description: Goals directly assisted by the player normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: xg_per90
fields.description: Expected goals generated by the player's shots normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: xgot_per90
fields.description: Expected goals on target generated by on-target shots normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: xa_per90
fields.description: Expected assists generated by the player's passes normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: big_chances_missed_per90
fields.description: Big chances that did not result in a goal normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: big_chance_xg_missed_per90
fields.description: Expected-goal value of missed big chances normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: own_goals_per90
fields.description: Own goals scored by the player normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: goals_over_xg_per90
fields.description: Goals above expected goals normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: assists_over_xa_per90
fields.description: Assists above expected assists normalized per 90 minutes.

fields.name: valuation_model_version
fields.description: Version identifier for the active valuation model.

fields.name: predicted_log_value_change
fields.description: Posterior mean predicted log market-value change.

fields.name: predicted_pct_value_change
fields.description: Predicted proportional change from the observed baseline value.

fields.name: probability_value_increase
fields.description: Posterior probability that market value increased.

fields.name: predictive_log_change_lower_90
fields.description: Lower bound of the 90% predictive interval on log change.

fields.name: predictive_log_change_upper_90
fields.description: Upper bound of the 90% predictive interval on log change.

fields.name: predicted_market_value_eur
fields.description: Model point estimate of current market value.

fields.name: predicted_market_value_lower_90_eur
fields.description: Lower bound of the 90% market-value predictive interval.

fields.name: predicted_market_value_upper_90_eur
fields.description: Upper bound of the 90% market-value predictive interval.

datasets.name: match_impacts
datasets.description: Recent player-match ratings exposed to the API with human-readable component explanations and optional valuation replay outputs.
datasets.grain: one player-match impact row per rating version
quality_rules: Replay fields may be null until historical replay scoring runs.
Rating and minutes are inherited from the immutable rating output.

fields.name: replay_run_id
fields.description: Identifier for the chronological valuation replay run.

fields.name: replay_sequence
fields.description: Order of the match inside a chronological replay.

fields.name: valuation_update_status
fields.description: Status of valuation scoring for the replayed match.

fields.name: valuation_estimate_eur
fields.description: Replayed point estimate after incorporating the match.

fields.name: valuation_lower_90_eur
fields.description: Lower bound of the replayed 90% predictive interval.

fields.name: valuation_upper_90_eur
fields.description: Upper bound of the replayed 90% predictive interval.

fields.name: estimated_value_delta_eur
fields.description: Change in the replayed valuation estimate after the match.

fields.name: probability_value_increase
fields.description: Posterior probability that market value increased.

fields.name: player_id
fields.description: Canonical player identifier used by the serving layer.

fields.name: match_id
fields.description: Stable WhoScored match identifier.

fields.name: match_datetime
fields.description: Scheduled or observed match kickoff timestamp.

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Published post-match rating exposed by the serving layer.

fields.name: performance_impact_score
fields.description: Difference between the match rating and the neutral 6.0 baseline.

fields.name: impact_direction
fields.description: Categorical positive, neutral, or negative interpretation of match impact.

fields.name: explanation
fields.description: Human-readable summary of the strongest rating components.

fields.name: minutes
fields.description: Minutes played in the row's match, season, or valuation interval.

fields.name: opponent
fields.description: Opponent display name when available from the serving build.

fields.name: rating_version
fields.description: Immutable version identifier for the post-match rating formula.

datasets.name: player_profiles
datasets.description: Long-form role-relative season profiles containing the underlying metric value and same-role EPL percentile.
datasets.grain: one player, season, and profile metric
quality_rules: Metric keys are unique per player, competition, and season.
Percentiles remain between zero and 100.
Primary-role share remains between zero and one.

fields.name: player_id
fields.description: Canonical player identifier used by the serving layer.

fields.name: whoscored_player_id
fields.description: Player identifier from WhoScored.

fields.name: player_name
fields.description: Player display name carried from the source record.

fields.name: competition
fields.description: Normalized competition key.

fields.name: season
fields.description: Competition season label in YYYY-YYYY format.

fields.name: primary_role
fields.description: Detailed role with the most eligible minutes in the season.

fields.name: secondary_role
fields.description: Detailed role with the second-most eligible minutes, when present.

fields.name: primary_role_share
fields.description: Share of eligible minutes played in the primary detailed role.

fields.name: is_hybrid_role
fields.description: Whether the primary role accounts for less than 60% of eligible role minutes.

fields.name: minutes
fields.description: Minutes played in the row's match, season, or valuation interval.

fields.name: appearances
fields.description: Distinct player appearances represented by the row.

fields.name: sample_status
fields.description: Whether the player meets the profile and benchmark sample thresholds.

fields.name: phase
fields.description: High-level phase grouping used to organize profile metrics.

fields.name: metric_key
fields.description: Stable machine-readable profile metric identifier.

fields.name: metric_label
fields.description: Human-readable label displayed in the profile chart.

fields.name: metric_value
fields.description: Underlying season metric value shown inside the profile wedge.

fields.name: percentile
fields.description: Same-role EPL percentile after winsorization and direction handling.

fields.name: higher_is_better
fields.description: Whether larger raw values represent stronger performance.

fields.name: display_order
fields.description: Stable order used to arrange metrics around the profile chart.

fields.name: benchmark_minutes
fields.description: Minimum season minutes required for inclusion in the percentile benchmark.

datasets.name: player_similarities
datasets.description: Ranked same-role player comparisons calculated from standardized role-specific season metrics.
datasets.grain: one selected player and similar-player pair per season
quality_rules: A player cannot be returned as their own comparison.
Similarity scores remain between zero and 100.
Ranks are unique within each selected-player profile.

fields.name: player_id
fields.description: Canonical player identifier used by the serving layer.

fields.name: whoscored_player_id
fields.description: Player identifier from WhoScored.

fields.name: player_name
fields.description: Player display name carried from the source record.

fields.name: similar_player_id
fields.description: Canonical identifier of the compared player.

fields.name: similar_player_name
fields.description: Display name of the compared player.

fields.name: competition
fields.description: Normalized competition key.

fields.name: season
fields.description: Competition season label in YYYY-YYYY format.

fields.name: primary_role
fields.description: Detailed role with the most eligible minutes in the season.

fields.name: secondary_role
fields.description: Detailed role with the second-most eligible minutes, when present.

fields.name: minutes
fields.description: Minutes played in the row's match, season, or valuation interval.

fields.name: appearances
fields.description: Distinct player appearances represented by the row.

fields.name: metrics_used
fields.description: Number of non-null standardized metrics used in the distance calculation.

fields.name: similarity
fields.description: Exponential similarity score derived from weighted standardized distance.

fields.name: profile_similarity
fields.description: Serving alias for the player-profile similarity score.

fields.name: rank
fields.description: Similarity rank within the selected player's candidate set.
